personal.name: Umangi Prajapati
personal.title: Senior Frontend Developer
personal.tagline: Building scalable, high-performance web experiences with React, Next.js and AEM Cloud.
personal.bio: Frontend Developer with 4.5+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using React.js, Next.js, and AEM Cloud. Skilled in implementing server-side rendering (SSR), lazy loading, and optimizing page performance. Proficient in developing reusable UI components, optimizing APIs, and creating responsive, accessible interfaces that enhance user experience.

experience.summary: Grew from Software Developer to Senior Software Developer, deeply involved in frontend development using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and GraphQL. Focused on building scalable UI components, improving performance through SSR, and contributing to a smooth developer workflow.
highlights: Refactored and modularized legacy code, reducing technical debt by 20% and improving maintainability
Built and maintained scalable UI components using Next.js and AEM Cloud
Improved page load times by 15% through server-side rendering (SSR), lazy loading, and caching strategies
Collaborated with cross-functional teams, ensuring 100% on-time delivery of projects
Conducted code reviews, mentored junior developers, and enforced best practices to uphold high code quality
Implemented Playwright for robust end-to-end testing, enhancing application stability and reliability
Integrated GraphQL APIs to optimize data fetching
Managed complex AEM Cloud integrations, streamlining content workflows and dynamic user experiences
Enhanced CI/CD pipelines using Git
Developed and maintained enterprise banking web applications using React.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and Redux
Built reusable UI components and improved frontend consistency across multiple workflows
Integrated REST APIs and collaborated with microservices teams to enhance performance and data reliability
Enhanced UI performance and accessibility while following enterprise security and compliance requirements
Worked in Agile sprints using Jira/Rally and supported CI/CD pipelines with Git, GitHub, and Jenkins
Built SPAs using ReactJS and Tailwind CSS, enhancing UI responsiveness by 20%
Integrated Context API for state management, improving global data synchronization
Improved client satisfaction by 95% by collaborating with UX teams to refine the user experience
Developed responsive user interfaces using React.js, ensuring cross-browser compatibility
Implemented frontend logic with Redux, maintaining clean and efficient code
Collaborated with UX/UI designers to translate design mockups into functional components
Created wireframes and transformed them into reusable UI components using React.js
Worked on React JS framework to develop Single Page Applications
Collaborated with stakeholders to deliver website updates and progress reports
Implemented stable React components and stand-alone functions for future pages
Ensured web application responsiveness using Bootstrap and CSS Media Queries

projects.title: Auriq AI — AI Chatbot
projects.description: Full-stack AI chatbot with real-time streaming responses using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini and Next.js App Router. Features intent-based routing to specialized agents for weather, math, coding, and jokes, plus multi-session chat management with IndexedDB persistence.
highlights: Real-time streaming responses with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini
Multi-chat system with persistent history via IndexedDB
Smart intent detection for weather, math, coding, jokes, and advice
Mobile-responsive UI with light/dark theme toggle
KaTeX math rendering and hydration-safe SSR components

projects.title: User Behavior Prediction — Web Log Mining
projects.description: A predictive analytics application built to forecast future item sales based on historical data, page hit reports, and exit page tracking.
highlights: Predicts future sales of items sold in previous years
Page hit and exit page report modules
Calculates user interaction patterns and session behavior

projects.title: Dogmates — Flutter App
projects.description: A mobile application for dog owners covering breed information, event listings, veterinary clinic locations, accessories shopping, and grooming session locators.
highlights: Dog breed information and event listings
Vet clinic location integration
Grooming session locator for male and female dogs
Login and registration flow with 3 main modules

projects.title: North County Climate Change Alliance — Website
projects.description: A nonprofit event-management website built for the North County Climate Change Alliance.
highlights: Single-page application built with ReactJS
Dynamic event management modules updated weekly
Bootstrap and CSS Media Queries for full responsiveness
PHP + MySQL backend with XAMPP server

projects.title: Cloud Marketing with Image Processing
projects.description: An online shopping platform using image processing to intelligently filter and surface products.
highlights: Image upload or keyword search with processing-based filtering
Displays relevant items based on visual matching
ReactJS SPA with PHP/MySQL backend

projects.title: Face Recognition & Password Authentication
projects.description: An Android app providing biometric security using facial recognition as a login password.
highlights: Face stored as password during registration
Biometric login for returning users
Android native implementation

projects.title: Online Voting System
projects.description: A digital voting application allowing citizens to vote for their preferred political party from anywhere.
highlights: Remote voting from any device
Secure voter registration and authentication
Basic but accessible UI built with C# and Visual Studio

certifications.title: Hands-On AI: Build an AI Chatbot with GPT-4o and Next.js
certifications.description: Covers building a production-ready AI chat app with Next.js and OpenAI GPT models, including conversation threading, message persistence, and real-time streaming responses.

certifications.title: Integrating Generative AI into JavaScript Web Projects
certifications.description: Teaches how to integrate OpenAI APIs into JavaScript web apps, covering chat completions, function calling, and building AI-powered virtual assistants.

certifications.title: What is GenAI
certifications.description: An introductory course explaining what Generative AI is, how it differs from traditional machine learning, and how it creates new content like text, images, and code.

certifications.title: CSS Certificate
certifications.description: Validates proficiency in CSS fundamentals including cascading and inheritance, text styling, layout techniques, and the box model.

certifications.title: JavaScript (Intermediate) Certificate
certifications.description: Assesses knowledge of advanced JavaScript concepts including design patterns, memory management, concurrency models, and event loops.

certifications.title: Software Engineer Certificate
certifications.description: A role-based certification validating proficiency in problem-solving, SQL, and REST APIs — core skills expected of software engineers.

certifications.title: REST API Certificate
certifications.description: Covers retrieving and processing data from APIs using parameters and pagination, validating hands-on REST API integration skills.

certifications.title: React JS Certificate
certifications.description: Validates React skills including basic routing, rendering elements, state management, event handling, ES6 syntax, and form validation.

certifications.title: JavaScript Specialist Certification
certifications.description: An advanced JavaScript certification covering functions, hoisting, scope, inheritance, events, error handling, and core language concepts.

certifications.title: Frontend Developer (React) Certificate
certifications.description: A role-based certification covering React, JavaScript, and CSS — validating the complete skill set expected of a frontend developer.

certifications.title: Front End Web Development
certifications.description: Covers building responsive, interactive websites using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, including responsive design, Ajax, and DOM manipulation.

certifications.title: Using Python to Access Web Data
certifications.description: Focuses on accessing and processing web data using Python, including API integration, JSON/XML parsing, and web scraping techniques.

recommendations.name: Skandh Gupta
recommendations.title: Software Engineer @ American Express | Java | Spring Boot | Microservices
recommendations.text: Umangi is an exceptional professional who consistently demonstrated a strong learning mindset and eagerness to stay up-to-date with the latest technologies. Her expertise in frontend development, particularly with Next.js, was evident in the quality and efficiency of her work. What stood out most was her clarity in understanding requirements and proactive communication. She brings a high level of ownership, accountability, and professionalism, and is a dependable team member who adds value through both technical contributions and a collaborative approach.

recommendations.name: Monte Nichols
recommendations.title: Senior Software Engineer at Buildit
recommendations.text: Umangi is a developer that consistently delivers production-ready software on schedule, with thorough testing and a genuine focus on the end user experience. Across multiple releases and shifting team dynamics, she proved reliable under pressure, picking up new technologies without losing momentum on her deliverables. Any team that brings her on will get someone who writes solid code, meets deadlines, and cares about quality.
